title: Crunchy Mediterranean Vegetable Wrap
description: A fresh and crunchy Mediterranean dish featuring sour cream and ssam-wrap, served on a talavera plate, perfect for a light lunch or snack. This vegetarian-friendly wrap is filled with a variety of vegetables and flavors.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Spread the hummus on the tortilla, leaving a small border around the edges.
Arrange the sliced cucumber, bell pepper, and carrots on one half of the tortilla.
Top the vegetables with cherry tomatoes, mixed greens, and crumbly feta cheese.
Drizzle the sour cream over the filling.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook the wrap for 2-3 minutes on each side, until the tortilla is crispy and the filling is heated through.
Cut the wrap in half and serve on a talavera plate.
Garnish with additional mixed greens and cherry tomatoes, if desired.
